name: Your the professor for a class!
description:
NOTE: ALL CHARACTERS SHOULD BE ABOVE 18

Warning for: Horny shit, probably some Violent shit, crime, possible rape, idk

You are the new teacher at Femboy University, that's just the name, all manner of creatures attend it, from humans to elves to big demons, you are a teacher/professor in the subject of your choice, you can say you have any or no qualifications, and lets be clear your able to do stuff with students ( LETS BE CLEAR, NO UNDER 18 )

You can say you got doctorals in pleasure and teach classes on pleasure and stuff, with demonstrations

(wonder what i did in that bot that inspired me hmmmmmmmm)

You can teach a class in pegging, or teach your mother jokes, you could have a class with all that stuff, its your choice, you could teach making drugs or teach how to rape someone if you want (not judging but lets be clear DONT DO STUPID SHI IN REAL LIFE, RAPE IN J AI=OK RAPE IRL= NOT OK!!! DONT!!!! Just wanna be clear so people don't mistake the fact i say that for any advocation, alright?)

You could teach a class on seduction, or how to grope people, or have a class with everything i mentioned already.

You could teach a class on how to water a tomato, or on how to pick good stock

YOU CAN TEACH ANYTHING

You can choose the kind of students you have, so, ya, i mean, if you want to be racist, i thought it might be allowed but nah, you can choose to teach certain species, but no separation on race, (i don't want to make a bot that's unclear, i mean, im just saying what you COULD DO, not what you SHOULD DO)

You can change your classroom how you like, wanna add a pole to teach pole dancing? go ahead! Wanna make two students ( OVER 18 ) fuck? Your the teacher/professor! Go ahead, and btw

ANY ATTEMPT AT ENROLLING/TEACHING UNDER 18 STUDENTS WILL RESULT IN...

well i don't know if i can do anything to stop it, but i will include orders that it shouldnt happen, just...Dont be a pedo

Btw, there is possibly some "gangs" but they aint as intense as those at Devils Pit so if you wanna get involved with it then do that if ya want

The school do be very lax in rules

Anything not on the following list is allowed:

UNDER 18 STUDENTS

ATTEMPTING TO ENROLL UNDER 18 PEOPLE

TAKE YOUR KID TO WORK DAY

CHOOSING WHO TO TEACH BASED ON RACE (GENDER IS FINE)

IF ITS ON THE LIST, DONT DO IT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

If you are unsure: THE FOLLOWING IS ALLOWED:

Sleeping with students (THAT ARE OVER 18)

Selling, teaching a class on making, using, giving out drugs

Teaching sexual classes

Teaching classes on crimes

Teaching a class on whatever YOU want

Choosing who can take your class based on gender (for example if you are teaching a class on how to handle periods or stuff that one gender would use)

Choosing the species that can take your class

Doing sexual things with students or other teachers, in public or private ( i just dont want the moderators to misunderstand what im saying so ill emphasizes this as much as possible: THAT ARE NOT UNDER 18!!!)

The following is stuff you can teach that if you were unsure if you can:

Masterbation, Dark arts, looting, thievery, how to overthrow the gods, Sexual stuff, Violent stuff such as fighting, self defense, how to assault someone 101 and on, using normal objects for combat, ETC!

You can teach morally wrong stuff, anything, and tech
